items.detail: From customer service to internal automation. We build agents that actually work in production.

Learns your business, not a generic template

items.detail: Make, n8n, custom webhooks — whatever it takes to connect your systems and eliminate manual work.

Handles exceptions like a human, but faster
Frees up time for what actually builds the company
Scalable from day one without extra hires
Connected to your entire operation, one flow and zero manual work

items.title: AI Products
items.description: All your competitors rent the same AI tools. You can own yours. A custom product built exactly for your business, that no one else can buy, copy, or take from you.
items.detail: Full-stack development with AI at the core. From idea to deployed product in weeks, not months.
features: You own everything: code, data, logic and future
Built for your business, not adapted to a generic tool
Your idea and our expertise, we make it possible
Scalable from day one with no ceiling
No vendor lock-in, never dependent on someone else's decisions

blocks.heading: YOUR TEAM WORKS TOO HARD. ON THE WRONG THINGS.
blocks.body: Most companies spend 60% of their time on things AI does better. We find out which.

blocks.heading: FROM BRIEF TO LIVE IN WEEKS.
blocks.body: We build working systems, not presentations. Integrated with your tools, tested with real data.

blocks.heading: SMARTER EVERY WEEK. STRONGER EVERY MONTH.
blocks.body: Your AI agents get better over time. We optimize, scale, and find new opportunities — without you lifting a finger.

items.question: How long does it take to implement an AI solution?
items.answer: Most projects go live within 2–6 weeks. We start with a brief discovery phase to understand your needs and then build iteratively. You will see progress after the first week.

items.question: Do we need technical expertise in-house?
items.answer: No. We handle the entire technical implementation. All we need from you is knowledge about your business and access to the systems that need to be integrated.

items.question: What does an AI agent or automation cost?
items.answer: Every project is unique and pricing depends on complexity and scope. We always provide a fixed quote after the discovery phase so you know exactly what it costs before we start.

items.question: How do you handle our data and GDPR?
items.answer: We are fully GDPR compliant. All data is processed within the EU, we sign DPAs when needed and build with privacy by design. Your data is never used to train AI models.

items.question: What tools and platforms do you work with?
items.answer: We are tool-agnostic and choose what fits best. Common tools include OpenAI, Anthropic, Make, n8n and custom builds with Python, TypeScript and modern AI frameworks.

items.question: How do we know if AI is right for our business?
items.answer: If you have repetitive processes, handle large volumes of data or want to scale without hiring, there is likely an AI solution that saves you time and money. Book a free call and we will do a quick assessment.

items.question: Do you offer support after delivery?
items.answer: Yes. Every project includes documentation and handover. We also offer ongoing support, optimization and further development so the solution grows with your business.

meta.title: AI Savings — How We Calculate Your ROI | Eteya
meta.description: Transparent methodology behind Eteya's ROI calculator. Calculations based on SCB, McKinsey and verified client data from a Swedish e-commerce company.

hero.title: How we calculate your AI savings
hero.subtitle: Transparent methodology based on academic sources and verified client data

quickResult.label: Average savings
quickResult.source: Based on {count} verified automations in {industry} ({employees} employees)

scb.title: SCB Salary Data
scb.footnote: Gross salaries per occupation (SSYK codes) 2024 + employer fees + vacation/pension

verified.title: Verified Client Data
verified.footnote: Telestore Sverige AB — Airtable data + interview

trustStack.quote: Eteya eliminated {amount} SEK/year in error costs — fully automated. The calculator only shows time savings, so the actual number is even higher.
trustStack.author: Brindar Akalp

howWeCalculate.title: HOW WE CALCULATE
howWeCalculate.subtext: Three independent sources. Conservative numbers. All verified.

sources.title: SCB Wage Statistics
sources.body: Gross salaries per occupation (SSYK codes 4222, 4119, 3322, 3313). Weighted average: 36,465 SEK/month + employer fees (31.42%) + vacation/pension → loaded cost ~54,333 SEK/month → ~418 SEK/h. Calculator value: 400 SEK/h (5% margin down — conservative).

sources.title: McKinsey Research
sources.body: "The Economic Potential of Generative AI" (2023). Customer operations: 30–45% cost reduction. All work activities: 60–70% of time (theoretical).

sources.title: Verified Client Data
sources.body: 56 active automations mapped at Telestore Sverige AB. Transaction volumes pulled directly from Airtable. Total verified savings: ~390,000 SEK/year.

sections.howWeCalculateSubtext: Three independent sources. Conservative numbers. All verified.
sections.approachBody: Most ROI calculators on the market rely solely on generic industry reports and theoretical assumptions. The problem? Every company is unique — processes, team sizes, tools, and system landscapes differ dramatically. Generic numbers produce generic results that rarely match reality.
sections.approachBody2: We solve this by combining industry data from recognized sources like SCB wage statistics and McKinsey Global Institute with verified customer data from real AI implementations. This gives calculations based on actual time savings — not theoretical estimates from consulting reports.
sections.approachBody3: All our assumptions are also conservative. We always round down, never up. This means the savings we show represent a lower bound — the actual savings are very likely higher.
sections.scbBody: Gross salaries per occupation (SSYK codes 4222, 4119, 3322, 3313). Weighted average: 36,465 SEK/month + employer fees (31.42%) + vacation/pension → loaded cost ~54,333 SEK/month → ~418 SEK/h. Calculator value: 400 SEK/h (5% margin down — conservative).
sections.mckinseyBody: "The Economic Potential of Generative AI" — automation potential per function. Customer operations: 30–45% cost reduction. All work activities: 60–70% of time (theoretical).
sections.verifiedBody: 56 active automations mapped at Telestore Sverige AB. Transaction volumes pulled directly from Airtable. Time estimates (before/after) from structured interview with the founder. Total verified savings: ~390,000 SEK/year.
sections.formulaBody:
Hours saved = Employees × Hours/week × Automation rate

Savings (SEK/year) = Hours saved × 52 × 400 SEK/h

Year 1 savings = Total × 0.40 (ramp-up factor)

Year 2: × 0.75 · Year 3: × 1.00 (fully realized)

Range: ±15% to reflect variation
sections.conservativeHeading: Why AI savings are always higher in reality
conservativeBody: Hourly cost 400 SEK/h — SCB calculates loaded cost to ~418 SEK/h including employer fees and vacation/pension. We use 400 SEK/h — a deliberate 5% margin down to keep the estimate conservative.
Overhead not included (office space, IT, equipment)
Error costs not included (Telestore: ~26,400 SEK/year eliminated)
Quality effects not monetized (Trustpilot 3 years running)
The calculator systematically underestimates actual savings
sections.limitationsBody: Single case study (e-commerce, <10 employees). Time estimates based on memory, not systematic measurement. No control group. McKinsey data from 2023 — technology evolves rapidly.
sections.disclaimerBody: The calculator is an estimation tool, not a guarantee. Actual savings depend on process maturity, system landscape and implementation quality.

meta.title: Telestore — 56 automations save 390,000 SEK/year | Eteya
meta.description: Eteya built 56 AI automations for Telestore that save 390,000 SEK/year — returns, delivery and support automated. Delivered in 3 weeks.
meta.ogImageAlt: Telestore case study — 390,000 SEK/year savings with 56 automations

about.title: About the company
about.achievement: Sweden's most satisfied customers on Trustpilot — 3 years running

challenge.title: The Challenge
challenge.card1Body: 75 phones every week were manually listed on telestore.se, Blocket and Tradera. Each listing took 7.5 minutes — time that could have been used for sales and customer service.
challenge.card2Body: 2.5 hours every week wasted troubleshooting manual lists. When something went wrong, 2–3 people were involved in coordination, troubleshooting and recovery.
challenge.card3Body: Wrong prices, missing deliveries and lost customer cases created direct costs. Every manual error risked losing customers and damaging the company's reputation.
challenge.card4Body: Every new phone required manual handling. The business couldn't grow without hiring more staff. The need for automation was urgent to break the bottleneck effect.

solution.title: The Solution
solution.body: 56 automations implemented in 3 weeks. Make, AI agents and scripts — all tested against real data.
solution.item1Body: 75 phones/week listed automatically on telestore.se, Blocket and Tradera with correct price, images and spec.
solution.item2Body: Every order automatically generated confirmation, shipping label and agreement. No manual steps, no forgotten details.
solution.item3Body: AI agents classified and responded to incoming mail around the clock, under one second per case.
solution.item4Body: The business grows without the team growing. Every new phone is handled automatically.

quote.text: We used to spend hours every week on manual tasks like creating shipping labels and confirming emails. Now Eteya handles all of that automatically. It's made us faster and less stressed.
quote.author: Brindar Akalp

savings.title: Savings
savings.subtitle: A detailed review of all automations we implemented for Telestore — from manual to fully automated processes.

meta.title: NordicRank — 18 automations save 13.4h/week | Eteya
meta.description: Eteya replaced NordicRank's manual Excel work with 18 AI automations — 13.4 hours/week back, order intake, status tracking and invoicing.
meta.ogImageAlt: Nordicrank case study — 13.4 hours back per week with automation

challenge.title: The Challenge
challenge.card1Title: The Excel sheet that never stopped growing
challenge.card1Body: Every order required manual entry into 3-5 different Excel sheets. Different people had different versions. No one knew which was actually current.
challenge.card2Body: To find out where an order stood required email archaeology. Information was scattered across the team — some answers were never found again.
challenge.card3Body: Manual errors were often discovered weeks later. By then the damage was done and cleanup took hours.
challenge.card4Title: Growth ate the time they should have scaled with
challenge.card4Body: Every new client meant 2-3 extra hours of admin per week. The time they needed to develop the business went to keeping it running.

solution.title: The Solution
solution.body: 18 automated flows implemented in 2 weeks. Excel lists disappeared entirely, manual admin replaced by a system that eats orders for the team.
solution.item1Body: Customers fill in a form. The system creates the order, assigns ownership, sets the deadline and sends confirmation — in 8 seconds, without anyone touching a key.
solution.item2Body: A single source for every order: status, owner, deadline, delivery date. Replaced 5+ Excel sheets that previously circulated in the organization.
solution.item3Body: The system verifies every delivery daily and triggers the next step. Customers get updates without anyone sending them manually.
solution.item4Body: When an order is complete, invoice and client report are generated. Month-end went from 6 hours to 20 minutes.

savings.title: Savings
savings.subtitle: A detailed review of every automation we built for Nordicrank — from manual Excel flows to fully automated processes.

quote.text: We were stuck in Excel. Eteya built a system that eats our orders for us — we got back time we didn't even know we were losing.
quote.author: Matyas Dios

meta.title: Sannegården Pizzeria — AI Receptionist | Eteya Case Study
meta.description: Sannegården Pizzeria missed calls during peak. Eteya built an AI receptionist taking orders 24/7 — 0 missed calls, 30+ extra orders/week.

savings.title: Savings
savings.subtitle: A detailed review of all automations we implemented for Sannegården — from manual to fully automated processes.

challenge.title: The Challenge
challenge.card1Body: During rush hours, customers called while staff were in the middle of service and cooking. When no one could answer, every missed call was a lost order.
challenge.card2Body: More incoming calls meant more stress, not more capacity. The phone became a bottleneck that prevented the team from focusing on what mattered most.
challenge.card3Body: Orders and questions came even outside the most staffed hours. Without someone to answer consistently, the restaurant missed out on both service and revenue.
challenge.card4Body: Customers called to ask about menus, opening hours and options. It interrupted work in the kitchen and took focus away from guests on site.

solution.title: The Solution
solution.body: An AI receptionist that takes orders around the clock, answers menu questions and confirms orders automatically via phone.
solution.item1Body: The AI receptionist answers immediately when customers call and guides them through the order without staff needing to leave the kitchen or register.
solution.item2Body: Every order is registered and confirmed automatically. No missed calls or lost orders.
solution.item3Body: Every order is clearly confirmed by phone so the customer knows everything is correct. It reduces misunderstandings and creates confidence in the purchase.
solution.item4Body: Sannegården can take more calls without hiring extra staff just for the phone. The solution scales with demand and ensures no calls fall through the cracks.

quote.text: The AI handles phone calls during rush hour. It has made sure we don't miss any orders anymore, even when we're busy in the kitchen.
quote.author: Kerem Celik

hero.title: Sannegården Pizzeria
hero.subtitle: Never a missed call during peak hours

meta.title: TrainWithAlbert — 45% rebooking + 3x bookings | Eteya
meta.description: Eteya built 8 AI automations for TrainWithAlbert — 3x more bookings, 45% rebooking, AI scheduling and automatic client journey follow-up.

challenge.title: The Challenge
challenge.card1Body: Albert spent hours every week coordinating times with clients via email and text. Double bookings and missed appointments were common.
challenge.card2Body: After each session, clients needed follow-up and next steps. Without automation, many fell off or didn't rebook.
challenge.card3Body: Reminding about unpaid invoices was uncomfortable and time-consuming. It led to worse cash flow and unnecessary administration.
challenge.card4Body: Each client received a customized program that was sent manually. It took time away from the actual coaching and was hard to scale.

solution.title: The Solution
solution.body: Automated client journey from booking to follow-up. AI-driven scheduling, automatic reminders and personalized training programs.
solution.item1Body: Clients book themselves via an intelligent calendar that avoids double bookings and sends automatic confirmations.
solution.item2Body: After each session, the client receives automatic follow-up with next steps, significantly increasing rebooking.
solution.item3Body: Reminders for upcoming sessions, unpaid invoices and follow-ups are sent automatically at the right time.
solution.item4Body: AI generates customized training programs based on the client's goals and progress, ready to send immediately.

quote.text: From answering the same questions all day to automating 90% of support. It has given me time to focus on helping people reach their goals.
quote.author: Albert Elshani

savings.title: Savings
savings.subtitle: A detailed review of all automations we implemented for TrainWithAlbert — from manual to fully automated processes.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.description: Eteya Consulting AB's privacy policy. We comply with GDPR and handle your personal data securely and transparently.

sections.heading: Who is the data controller?
sections.content: Eteya Consulting AB is the data controller for the processing of your personal data.
For questions about privacy and personal data, contact us at: Kontakt@eteya.ai

sections.heading: What personal data do we collect?
items: Technical information: IP address, browser type, operating system

sections.heading: Why do we process your personal data?
items: To provide our services (GDPR Art. 6(1)(b)): Contractual necessity: We process data required to deliver our services to you as a customer or supplier.
For customer support (GDPR Art. 6(1)(b)): Contractual necessity: We process data to provide you with support and answer your questions.
For marketing (GDPR Art. 6(1)(a)): Consent: We send newsletters and marketing only if you have given us your consent. You can withdraw your consent at any time.

For business development (GDPR Art. 6(1)(f)): Legitimate interests: We process business contact information to market our services to relevant decision-makers. Our legitimate interest is to develop our business. We conduct a balancing test where your rights take precedence if you object.

sections.content: Right to withdraw consent: If the processing is based on your consent, you always have the right to withdraw it at any time. Withdrawal does not affect processing that took place before the withdrawal.

sections.heading: How long do we keep your data?
Do we share your data with third parties?
items: International transfers: Some of our subprocessors (e.g., Google, Microsoft) may process data outside the EU/EEA, primarily in the USA. We protect your data through the EU Commission's Standard Contractual Clauses and additional technical measures. Contact us for more information.

sections.heading: Security
items: Encryption of data in transit and at rest

sections.heading: Cookies and tracking
items: Necessary cookies — required for the site to function (consent record, language preference). Cannot be disabled.

Analytics — we use Google Analytics 4 (GA4) to understand how visitors use the site. GA4 uses cookies stored for up to 14 months. IP addresses are anonymized before storage. Data is processed by Google LLC in the US under the EU–US Data Privacy Framework.

Vercel Web Analytics — anonymous, hash-based visitor counting without cookies. No information is stored on your device, and the hash is discarded after 24 hours. Does not require consent under EU ePrivacy law but is disclosed here for transparency. Legal basis: legitimate interest (Art. 6(1)(f) GDPR).
Marketing — currently disabled. If we later enable remarketing, it will require your consent and be disclosed here.
Google Consent Mode v2 — the site respects your choice in the cookie banner. If you decline, only anonymous signals are sent — no cookies or identifiers.
Withdraw consent — you can change or withdraw your consent at any time by clicking "Manage cookies" in the footer.
Supervisory authority — you may file a complaint with the Swedish Authority for Privacy Protection (Integritetsskyddsmyndigheten, IMY — formerly Datainspektionen). Website: imy.se

sections.heading: Complaints
sections.content: If you have complaints about our processing of personal data, you can contact the Swedish Authority for Privacy Protection (IMY):

schema.name: Privacy Policy — GDPR & Personal Data | Eteya
schema.description: Eteya Consulting AB's privacy policy. We comply with GDPR and handle your personal data securely and transparently.

meta.title: Terms of Service | Eteya
meta.description: Terms of service for Eteya Consulting AB AI automation services. Read about withdrawal rights, complaints, payment and more.

schema.name: Terms of Service — Eteya Consulting AB
schema.description: Terms of service for Eteya Consulting AB AI automation services. Read about withdrawal rights, complaints, payment and more.

sections.heading: Our Services
sections.content: We provide AI automation services according to agreement. Services are delivered according to specification and agreed timeline.

sections.heading: Payment Terms
sections.content: Payment is made according to invoice with 14 days payment terms. In case of delayed payment, interest is added according to the Interest Act.

sections.heading: 14-Day Right of Withdrawal
sections.content: As a consumer, you have a 14-day right of withdrawal according to the Distance Contracts Act. The withdrawal period is calculated from the conclusion of the agreement. To exercise your right of withdrawal, contact us at kontakt@eteya.ai.

sections.heading: 3-Year Complaint Period
sections.content: You have a 3-year complaint period according to the Consumer Sales Act. Complaints are made by contacting us. For the first 2 years, the burden of proof lies with us.

sections.heading: Limitation of Liability
sections.content: We are responsible for the service's function according to specification. Our total liability is limited to what you have paid for the service. We are not liable for indirect damages or consequential damages.

sections.heading: IP Rights
sections.content: All rights to deliverables and materials belong to Eteya Consulting AB unless otherwise agreed. The customer receives a non-exclusive license to use deliverables for internal use.

sections.heading: Circumstances Beyond Our Control
sections.content: We are not liable for delays or omissions due to circumstances beyond our control (e.g., natural disaster, war, strike, government decision).

sections.heading: Termination
sections.content: Agreements can be terminated with 30 days notice. Upon termination, the service ends and data is deleted according to applicable legislation.

sections.heading: Dispute Resolution
texts: In case of disputes, we first attempt to resolve them through direct negotiation.
If negotiation does not lead to a solution, you as a consumer can turn to the National Board for Consumer Disputes (ARN).
ARN handles disputes between consumers and traders at no cost to the consumer.

items.name: Consumer Sales Act (2022:266)
items.description: Governs purchases of services between businesses and consumers.

items.name: Distance Contracts Act (2005:59)
items.description: Governs distance contracts and contracts outside business premises.

items.name: Contracts Act (1915:218)
items.description: Basic law on contracts and powers of attorney.

items.name: E-Commerce Act (2002:562)
items.description: Governs electronic commerce and information society services.

meta.title: SKG Stockholm — AI Assistant for CEO saves 12h/week | Eteya
meta.description: Eteya built a personal AI assistant for SKG Stockholm's CEO that saves 12 hours/week from admin — letting him focus on building the company instead.
meta.ogImageAlt: SKG Stockholm — Personal AI assistant for CEO | Eteya

hero.title: SKG Stockholm
hero.subtitle: 12 hours a week freed up — the CEO now has an AI chief of staff

challenge.title: The Challenge
challenge.card1Body: Mirza received 200+ emails a day from customers, suppliers, staff and the board. Important messages drowned in noise — and replies had to wait until late evenings.
challenge.card2Body: Meetings stacked up with no breathing room. No prep time, no buffers — and travel between offices and customers made the days even more fragmented.
challenge.card3Body: Promises from phone calls, actions from meetings, small to-dos — all living only in his head. Things fell through the cracks and relationships suffered.
challenge.card4Body: As CEO of a growing wholesaler, Mirza needed to focus on acquisitions, hiring and long-term direction. But operational minutiae consumed the entire workday.

solution.title: The Solution
solution.body: A personal AI assistant acting as chief of staff — reading, prioritizing, planning and following up. Always available, always updated, never tired.
solution.item1Body: Reads every incoming email, categorizes by urgency and drafts responses in Mirza's own tone. Routine emails are answered automatically — important ones surfaced for his approval.
solution.item2Body: Books meetings, handles reschedules between participants, sends briefs before important meetings and blocks focus time automatically. Suggests when meetings should be moved to protect deep work.
solution.item3Body: Logs what's said in calls and meetings, extracts action items and makes sure nothing slips through the cracks. Reminds Mirza when something needs a follow-up.
solution.item4Body: Every morning a 2-minute brief: today's most important emails, the calendar, open follow-ups and where he should focus his energy. No more reactive starts.

savings.title: Savings
savings.subtitle: A detailed breakdown of Mirza's AI assistant — from overflowing inbox to full control over the day.

quote.text: Eteya's assistant hasn't replaced anyone — it has multiplied me. Now I have time to build the company, not just keep it afloat.
quote.author: Mirza Ekici
